message:
feat(FJ-P2C-006-E): unit + property tests for backend bridge

37 tests covering 6 categories: primitive execution (add2, square,
add_one, sin, cos), capability queries, backend selection routing,
fallback behavior, memory layout contiguity, and multi-backend
isolation. 3 property tests: allocation size match, transfer data
preservation, device count consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
